Mon Tresor

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Official website latest FENDI hand-stitched Togo leather cat bag
New Peekaboo cat bag, only to see a different side of you. The new design continues the classic Peekaboo trapezoidal silhouette and square turnlock design, with a fan design on the side, full of a sense of high class! Every stitch is extremely skillful! Original custom!
Size 27x21x9.5cm. Style No.: 302

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
FF Lanbu
Peekaboo X-Tote handbag embroidery tote! With internal pockets and iconic turnlock. Features two short handles for hand carrying and two long handles for shoulder carrying. Houndstooth canvas material. Coordinating embossed FF decorative pattern. Top-grain cowhide trim. Gold metal hardware. Size 40*12*29cm Style No.: Shopping bag FF Lanbu
